commit_message:
docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-463

Run: polaris-run-pol-463-2026-07-07-001
Cluster: POL-463
Children: POL-464, POL-465, POL-466, POL-467, POL-468, POL-469
Files updated:
- POLARIS.md: 9 files
- SUMMARY.md: 6 files
- docs ingested: 0
- links repaired: 0

drift_observations.detail: Referenced Worker Router as future planning; router is now implemented in src/loop/router/
Referenced router fallback as future; adapter fallback is now integrated
Architecture notes said router types were future; routerPolicy is now in schema and defaults
Draft stub did not describe child-selector.ts slot-aware scheduling
Draft stub did not describe runtime folder role
Draft stub did not describe SOL scoring or router outcome summarization
Draft stub did not describe cluster state store and slot claim functions
Draft stub did not describe test coverage for adapter fallback and router evidence
Current State did not mention Worker Router integration
Current State did not mention pre-dispatch fallback integration
Current State did not mention routerPolicy config types
Worker Router spec still described as in-progress; all 6 stages are complete

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added router/ and missing files to What belongs here; replaced future-planning architecture notes with current implementation facts; updated Read before editing to include router source files.
Updated Architecture notes to reflect router fallback integration in TerminalCliAdapter and AgentSubtaskAdapter; updated Read before editing with router schema types.
Replaced future-planning architecture note with current fact: routerPolicy (WorkerRouterPolicyConfig) is now in schema, schema.json, and defaults.
Replaced draft stub with full content describing child-selector.ts slot-aware scheduling, pure-function invariant, injected decide_route callback, and relationship to router and cluster-state.
Replaced draft stub with full content describing runtime infrastructure layer, scheduling subfolder, and relationship to loop and cluster-state.
Replaced draft stub with full content describing SOL scoring pipeline, summarizeRouterOutcomes(), dev-gate requirements, and relationship to loop telemetry.
Replaced draft stub with full content describing atomic read/write API, pruneExpiredClaims, types, and editing rules for slot claim management.
Replaced draft stub with content describing terminal-cli.test.ts coverage for dispatch, fallback, quota signals, and router evidence attachment.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Added Current State section describing Worker Router integration, slot-aware scheduling, adapter fallback, and SOL telemetry.
Updated Current State to describe router fallback in TerminalCliAdapter and AgentSubtaskAdapter including pre_dispatch_failure and router_evidence.
Updated Current State to describe routerPolicy config surface and backward-compatible default behavior.
Replaced draft stub with real summary describing selectNextChild() pure function, slot claims, and architectural role.
Replaced draft stub with real summary describing runtime infrastructure layer and scheduling subfolder.
Replaced draft stub with real summary describing terminal-cli.test.ts adapter test coverage.
Updated Worker Router spec reference to reflect all 6 delivery stages complete (POL-464 through POL-469).

docs_archived.reason: One-time design boundaries analysis; superseded by worker-router-architecture.md spec. Retained in raw/analysis/ in place.

evidence_summary: POL-463 cluster (6 children: POL-464 through POL-469) delivered the complete Worker Router implementation: architecture spec, config/schema types, deterministic engine, slot-aware scheduling, adapter fallback integration, and SOL telemetry. Nine POLARIS.md files and six SUMMARY.md files were updated. Draft stubs in src/runtime/scheduling, src/runtime, src/autoresearch, src/cluster-state, and src/loop/adapters/__tests__ were replaced with real operational guidance. Stale "future planning" language in src/loop, src/loop/adapters, and src/config was corrected to reflect the implemented router. The smartdocs/specs/active/SUMMARY.md was updated to mark all 6 Worker Router stages complete. The pol-464 analysis doc was classified as archived in place. No broken links, no docs promoted, no cognition notes to archive. All changes committed as a single librarian commit.
